It greatly, GREATLY fanned the fire inside me to do what I can for #Occupy and I bet I'm not the only one. They're all over the city.
I find it interesting that #opd has decided to create an atmosphere of indiscriminate war against the people in the streets.
.@ShantyTownie Just seems indicative to me that the police in Oakland are completely off-the-leash in regards to interacting with the public
@iaminoak Couldn't, all their arms were crossed. Call me a puss but I was alone and it didn't seem the time to pursue that.
#occupyoakland #oo pt6: The cop who had thrown my gift of donuts into the street said "Occupy a job", "I have a job." I responded
#occupyoakland #oo pt5: Another officer said "I'll take them" so I handed them to him, he threw them over his shoulder into the street...
#occupyoakland #oo pt4: "I'll give you these if you promise not to beat anybody." "I can't promise that, that's rough." "Really?" I asked...
#occupyoakland #oo pt3: I got a $1 pack of donut holes and brought them outside. I walked up to the group of officers and held them out...
#occupyoakland #oo pt2: One of the cops yelled to me "Nice boots" as I walked inside, so inside I decided to respond to that...
#occupyoakland #oo pt1: I went to the liquor store across from my apartment to get some water, there was a group of cops standing outside…
#occupyoakland #oo #ftp As I walked home from #ogp / Frank Ogawa Plaza I had an interesting encounter with police: http://t.co/NXZEXxPq
@nzmrmn No, I just talked to him. He's at the Plaza.
@OccupyPeoria @occupyoakland @oo_media Or more importantly, photograph them so it can be confirmed independently.
